entities.name: Expense

fields.name: id
fields.description: Primary key, generated client-side (crypto.randomUUID)

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Expense amount in user's local currency

fields.name: categoryId
fields.description: Foreign key to Category entity

fields.name: merchantName
fields.description: Merchant or description label for the expense

fields.name: date
fields.description: Date the expense occurred or is scheduled

fields.name: paymentMethod
fields.description: Enum-like: e.g. CASH, CREDIT_CARD, DEBIT_CARD, etc.

fields.name: note
fields.description: Optional free-text note

fields.name: recurringTemplateId
fields.description: Nullable FK linking this occurrence to its parent RecurringTemplate. NULL for one-time expenses. Preserved even if the template is deleted (data-integrity constraint). Supports feat-003, feat-004, feat-005.

fields.name: isRecurringInstance
fields.description: Derived flag (true when recurringTemplateId is non-null at write time) stored for fast filtering in dashboard queries and Spending Insights (feat-002, feat-008). Default false.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Record creation timestamp, set client-side

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Last modification timestamp, updated on every write

relationships: recurringTemplateId: uuid fk->RecurringTemplate (nullable, preserved on template deletion)

fields.name: id
fields.description: Primary key

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name of the category; unique(name)

fields.name: color
fields.description: Hex color string e.g. #FF5733

fields.name: isDefault
fields.description: Whether this is a system-provided default category. Default false.

entities.name: RecurringTemplate

fields.name: id
fields.description: Primary key, generated client-side (crypto.randomUUID)

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Canonical amount for each generated occurrence

fields.name: categoryId
fields.description: Foreign key to Category entity

fields.name: merchantName
fields.description: Merchant or description label used when generating occurrences

fields.name: frequency
fields.description: Enum: WEEKLY | MONTHLY | YEARLY. Drives occurrence generation (feat-001, feat-002).

fields.name: startDate
fields.description: Date from which recurrence begins; first occurrence anchor

fields.name: endDate
fields.description: Optional date after which no new occurrences are generated (feat-001)

fields.name: nextOccurrenceDate
fields.description: Computed and persisted date of the next occurrence to be generated. Used for dashboard upcoming card sort (feat-002) and Manage Recurring list (feat-006). Updated after each occurrence is written.

fields.name: paymentMethod
fields.description: Enum-like: propagated to generated Expense occurrences

fields.name: note
fields.description: Optional note propagated to generated occurrences

fields.name: status
fields.description: Enum: ACTIVE | PAUSED | CANCELLED. PAUSED stops occurrence generation (feat-007); CANCELLED is soft-delete for series deletion (feat-005). Default ACTIVE.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Record creation timestamp

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Last modification timestamp; updated on edit-series, pause, resume, cancel

relationships: unique(merchantName, frequency, startDate, categoryId) — prevents accidental duplicate template creation
